'''''Triumph''''' was a group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] belonging to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. They were sent to try and destroy the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] ''[[Harpax]]'' along with three [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]] and two [[Delta-class JV-7 escort shuttle]]s. However, all of the Rebel forces were destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] Ace [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

{{Ship-stub}}
